## DOT STRIP chart, AGRAW style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-DST-03",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "distribution",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "every raw value as a dot on one shared scale, one strip per category",
  "data_required": "3+ raw values per category, few enough to plot individually (<= ~30 per row)",
  "family": "DST",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DST-07 (one pooled swarm)",
    "CH-DST-04 (5-number summary)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "one pooled group, outliers by name",
      "use": "CH-DST-07"
    },
    {
      "when": "too many points to draw raw",
      "use": "CH-DST-04"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- small samples where every raw value can be shown honestly
- comparing spread and overlap across a few categories

Do NOT use when:
- hundreds of points per row (CH-DST-04 summarizes)
- two paired measures per category (CH-DST-02)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on the top axis tick",
  "categories": "array of {label, values: [raw values], highlight?}"
}
```

```json
    "x_zero": true,

    "algorithm": "FN-05 nice scale"
  }

```

### Rules
- raw values only: no jitter, overlaps are information
- shared zero-based scale across all strips
- highlight bolds the category label, dots stay one role

### Never do this
- random jitter (breaks determinism and honesty)
- per-row scales
- summarizing away the raw values

### QA before delivering
- [ ] >= 3 values per row
- [ ] shared scale
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| dot | `#008080` |
| baseline | `#1A1A1A` |
| tick_label | `#3D3D3D` |
| category_label | `#3D3D3D` |
| title | `#1A1A1A` |
| source | `#3D3D3D` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif, weight 600
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
